message: WMI-2 live resource inconsistency (bookkeeping-field-threshold-gate): the resource's bookkeeping-value field 'device_dma_parameters.segment_boundary_mask' is consulted inconsistently while the resource stays live (no free) — a candidate live type/extent confusion.
